rules.R1: Test immutability - tests must not be modified to make them pass
rules.R2: No ignore injection - no new #[ignore] attributes allowed
rules.R3: Proof from CI only - verification must be generated by CI, not PR
rules.R4: Full test execution - all tests must run, no skipping
rules.R5: Baseline verified - verification_report.json must show baseline_verified=true
rules.R6: Test count invariant - test count must not decrease
rules.R7: CI integrity - tests must pass without modification
